mapper.select: SELECT id, code, created_at as createdAt, created_by as createdBy, used_by as usedBy, used_at as usedAt, is_active as isActive, remark FROM teacher_invitation_code WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, code, created_at as createdAt, created_by as createdBy, used_by as usedBy, used_at as usedAt, is_active as isActive, remark FROM teacher_invitation_code WHERE id >= ( SELECT id FROM teacher_invitation_code ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET #{offset} ) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{size}
SELECT id, code, created_at as createdAt, created_by as createdBy, used_by as usedBy, used_at as usedAt, is_active as isActive, remark FROM teacher_invitation_code WHERE code = #{code}
SELECT id, code, created_at as createdAt, created_by as createdBy, used_by as usedBy, used_at as usedAt, is_active as isActive, remark FROM teacher_invitation_code WHERE used_by = #{usedBy}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teacher_invitation_code (code, created_by, is_active, remark) VALUES (#{code}, #{createdBy}, #{isActive}, #{remark})
